iterations.title: Rename gap files to <source>-G<nnnn>-<stub>.json, migrate existing records

verdicts.reason: Filenames don't need the G prefix on the padded id - <source>-<nnnn>-<stub>.json is enough, being under .lume/gaps/ already says it's a gap

workstream.title: Gap filenames follow the workstream convention: <source>-G<nnnn>-<stub>.json
